name: pdf-workstation-tests
description: E2E test harness for the PDF Workstation single-file SPA. Uses puppeteer-core to drive system Chrome against the production index.html. Verifies: (T1) dependency regressions don't break the load, (T2) each of the 6 modes produces a non-empty PDF, (T11) A5 metadata auto-strip actually strips Author/Creator/Producer/dates.
